mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO stock_suspend_d (ts_code, trade_date, suspend_timing, suspend_type) VALUES
(#{item.tsCode}, #{item.tradeDate}, #{item.suspendTiming}, #{item.suspendType})
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM stock_suspend_d WHERE
(ts_code = #{item.tsCode} AND trade_date = #{item.tradeDate})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stock_suspend_d WHERE suspend_type IS NULL OR suspend_type NOT IN ('S', 'R')
